# Golden Go fixtures whose module caches are baked into the union image
# (item 5.1, #268; see docs/v2/phase_1/design_cost_latency.md). One line per
# fixture: <name> <owner/repo> <commit>. Keep in sync with the [fixture]
# pins in benchmark/stories/*.toml. A re-pin that CHANGES a fixture's module
# inputs (go.mod/go.sum) means a republish (the maintainer/release step) and
# the digest in configs/*.toml moves with it. A re-pin that leaves them
# byte-identical does not: the image is a pure function of those inputs, so it
# is unchanged. `make cache-verify` is the gate that decides — it fails offline
# if the image does not cover the current pins. Never skip it on the argument
# that a change 'looks harmless'.
cms  SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-cms   748681e3ba581c2853b5e7fcd8ff6a0ca06d5f3b
llms SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-llms  7729fffe3f2a15b97de6ba8dd73273fd562fad0d
chat SnapdragonPartners/golden-fixture-chat  60e79fd075c8f3f13d7c8650012a2fc74f77de4a
